title: Home Screen - Both earbuds are disconnected
scenario: Home screen shows greyed out earbud and case fields with disconnected status when both earbuds are placed in the case
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure both earbuds are disconnected from the app (Home screen shows disconnected status).
3. Place both earbuds into the charging case.
4. Observe the Home screen of the app.
expected: On the Home screen, the "Left", "Right", and "Case" fields should be greyed out and show only the "%" symbol (not an exact percentage). The "Status" field should display "disconnected" with a red indicator. The device image should be greyed out.
